one_liner: Acupuncture beyond the supplemental benefit limit — internal criteria legitimately apply, denial supported

service.description: Acupuncture wellness visits, 20 requested for calendar year

clinical_summary: 69F requesting 20 acupuncture wellness visits under the plan's supplemental benefit with physician referral. Eight visits already used this calendar year.

draft_decision.rationale: Supplemental wellness benefit is limited to 12 visits per calendar year; 8 already used, 20 more requested exceeds the published benefit limit.
draft_decision.specific_reason: Your plan's supplemental acupuncture benefit covers up to 12 visits per calendar year. You have used 8; up to 4 more can be covered this year, so a request for 20 additional visits exceeds the benefit limit.
